things.name: Nuremberg Castle
things.description: Magnificent imperial fortress overlooking the old town, seat of the Holy Roman Emperors

things.name: Documentation Centre Nazi Party Rally Grounds
things.description: Powerful museum in the unfinished Congress Hall examining the rise of Nazism

things.name: Christkindlesmarkt
things.description: Germany's most famous Christmas market in the medieval old town since the 16th century

things.name: Frauenkirche
things.description: Gothic hall church on the main market with the famous Männleinlaufen clock

things.name: German National Museum
things.description: Largest museum of German cultural history with over 1.3 million objects

things.name: Albrecht-Durer-Haus
things.description: Home of the Renaissance master Albrecht Durer with multimedia exhibition

things.name: Toy Museum
things.description: Playful museum celebrating the city's 500-year toy-making tradition

things.name: Handwerkerhof
things.description: Craftsmen's courtyard with traditional Franconian speciality shops and workshops

things.name: Nazi Party Rally Grounds
things.description: Vast complex used for mass Nazi rallies, including the Zeppelin Field

things.name: Medieval Dungeons
things.description: Fascinating tour through the castle's dungeons and medieval torture chambers
